task_name: Rubik's Cube Training (NOT an FLS task)
rationale: This video shows an instructor (identified as Roberto Miki, MD) demonstrating how to solve a Rubik's Cube, not any of the five official FLS/MISTELS tasks. The content includes narration, multiple demonstration angles, and educational setup typical of instructional content. No laparoscopic surgical training equipment, suturing, cutting, knot-tying, or peg transfer activities are present.
cannot_score_reason: This is not an FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task. The five official FLS/MISTELS tasks are: (1) Peg Transfer, (2) Pattern Cut, (3) Endoloop, (4) Extracorporeal Suture, and (5) Intracorporeal Suture. This video depicts recreational puzzle-solving with no laparoscopic surgical context.

teaching_content.subject: Rubik's Cube speedcubing technique
verbal_cues: Instructor presents cube-solving tips and demonstrations
common_errors_addressed: Lack of systematic approach to layer solving
